setup_cmd: apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq graphviz libgraphviz-dev python3-dev pkg-config && sed -i '/^required-version/d' pyproject.toml 2>/dev/null; true && sed -i '/mo_pack/d' pyproject.toml && sed -i '/mo-pack/d' pyproject.toml && uv venv /opt/venv --quiet && uv pip install --python /opt/venv/bin/python -e . pytest pytest-cov pytest-xdist --quiet
